name: ESP_ERR_HTTPD_BASE
comment: Starting number of HTTPD error codes

name: ESP_ERR_HTTPD_HANDLERS_FULL
comment: All slots for registering URI handlers have been consumed

name: ESP_ERR_HTTPD_HANDLER_EXISTS
comment: URI handler with same method and target URI already registered

name: ESP_ERR_HTTPD_RESP_HDR
comment: Response header field larger than supported

name: ESP_ERR_HTTPD_RESP_SEND
comment: Error occurred while sending response packet

name: ESP_ERR_HTTPD_ALLOC_MEM
comment: Failed to dynamically allocate memory for resource
